title: oryzopsis coerulescens
intro: Oryzopsis coerulescens, also known as blue rice grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and improve digestion. Oryzopsis coerulescens is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
